description: Grade 1 Environmental Activities learning areas about self, home, school, and nature.

learningAreas.title: Self and Family
learningAreas.description: Learn about body parts, family members, and caring for self.

learningAreas.title: Home and School
learningAreas.description: Know safe places, helpers, and responsibilities at home and school.

learningAreas.title: Plants and Animals
learningAreas.description: Observe common plants and animals in the local environment.

learningAreas.title: Weather
learningAreas.description: Notice simple weather changes and choose safe clothing.
